title: 直播设备 Streaming Rig Setup
description: Hardware and software configuration for live streaming across platforms

tasks.text: Select USB microphone (clear voice for commentary)
Optional: select webcam for face-cam overlay
Configure OBS scenes: Board + Engine eval + Chat + Webcam layouts
Set up RTMP endpoints for Douyin Live, Bilibili Live
Test stream at 1080p/30fps H.264 — check quality and latency
Create OBS scene presets: 'Live Play', 'Puzzle Review', 'Game Analysis'
Test multi-platform simultaneous streaming (Restream.io or similar)
